candidate: MUDSKIP-MODE: dual-mode batch-streaming inference with environmental detector + context-preserving valve transition

rank_6_bimodal_batch_stream_2603.07512.note: direct match: dual-mode batch-streaming engine with adaptive switch

rank_8_context_preserving_2509.20194.note: context-preserving valve for mode transition w/o state loss

per_result_judgments.title: Mudskipper — Wikipedia
per_result_judgments.rationale: Source-domain biology page; no LLM-side functional overlap.

per_result_judgments.title: KVPR I/O-Aware KV Cache (ACL 2025)
per_result_judgments.rationale: KV-cache I/O management is tangential; touches the KV-light path idea but lacks dual-mode switching or environmental detector. Below all hit thresholds.

per_result_judgments.title: Customizing LLMs for Latency-Aware Inference (USENIX ATC 2025)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Latency-aware customization shares the streaming/decode optimization mode; kw>=2 (latency, inference) and func>=0.7. Hits.

per_result_judgments.title: Continuous batching (HF)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Chunked prefill + ragged batching represents the batch-throughput mode of the proposal; kw>=2 (batching, prefill) and func at threshold.

per_result_judgments.title: STAR Decode-Phase Rescheduling (2025/10)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Decode-phase rescheduling overlaps with mode-switching across phases; kw>=2 and func>=0.7.

per_result_judgments.title: Bimodal Batch-Stream Inference Engine for LLMs (2026/3)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Direct functional twin: dual-mode batch-streaming engine with adaptive mode switch. Saturates kw, sem, func.

per_result_judgments.title: Request-Mode-Aware Adaptive Inference Switching (2025/11)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Request-mode detector triggering throughput/latency switching matches the environmental detector + mode switch core.

per_result_judgments.title: Context-Preserving Mode Transition for LLM Serving (2025/9)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Context-preserving valve for mode transition without state loss is the exact valve component of MUDSKIP-MODE.

summary: Three prior works (ranks 6, 7, 8) cover each pillar of MUDSKIP-MODE directly: bimodal batch-stream engine, request-mode-aware switching, and context-preserving valve transition. Three further results (ranks 3, 4, 5) hit on the throughput/latency mode-optimization axis. Only the Wikipedia source-domain page and KVPR fall below the hit threshold. Candidate is not novel.
